creator: sarawgi.aditya@gmail.com
text:
I am trying to get the scala plugin working but I am facing a similar
issue. I can see the plugins are there but I can't start jdt weaving.
When I try to start it, it says couldn't start aspectj. So clearly the
plugin is not getting loaded. So what do you suggest I move all the
plugins to /usr/local/lib/eclipse/dropins (btw I don't see the eclipse
directory in my lib folder ) ? What is the logic behind this ?
If this works it would be nice to patch eclipse so that all the
plugins go in this directory.

-- 
Cheers,
Aditya Sarawgi
